author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate bundled package runtime option parsing helpers

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: readStringOption/readBooleanOption and adjacent SDK-runtime loading boilerplate are repeated across bundled package runtimes. Exact clones show in packages/pm-linked-test-adapters/extensions/linked-test-adapters/runtime.ts:67 and packages/pm-guide-shell/extensions/guide-shell/runtime.ts:99, with the same helper shape also present in pm-governance-audit and pm-search-advanced plus committed JS twins. This is not covered by pm-why9, which is scoped to CLI parser blocks, item casts, runtime schema defaults, and update.ts field tables. Fix by moving package runtime option readers/load helpers into a shared package-runtime helper that built-in packages can import or generate from, while preserving standalone package behavior and JS/TS packaging expectations.

A single shared helper owns package runtime string/boolean option parsing and common runtime-load failure handling; linked-test-adapters, guide-shell, governance-audit, and search-advanced runtimes no longer carry copy-pasted helper bodies; package smoke tests and pnpm build stay green.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: searched package runtime/helper terms; closest items were closed pm-hkql/pm-2t78 package runtime work and broad pm-59gj, but no open item specifically tracks this helper clone. Scan found 8 files sharing 10-line windows around readStringOption/readBooleanOption.

message: Create duplicate-code finding for bundled package runtime helpers

value.author: package-dedup-agent
value.text: Approach (dedup agent): Investigated package sharing model. Packages are standalone-installable and reach into the host pm-cli install at runtime via PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT -> dist/sdk/runtime.js. tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts enforces that package sources may ONLY import the SDK surface (regex forbids ../../../../{src,dist}/{core,types}/) and that runtime.js must reference dist/sdk/{index,runtime}.js. tsconfig.packages.json is noEmit:true, so .ts twins are typecheck-only and the hand-maintained .js files ship/run. Decision: the ONLY legitimate shared surface is the SDK runtime. Plan: add pure dependency-free readStringOption/readBooleanOption/readCsvListOption helpers to src/sdk/runtime.ts (mirrored to dist via build), expose them on each package's loaded SDK bundle, and destructure them in each package instead of redefining the helper bodies. The ensureRuntimeBundle/loadRuntimeBundle bootstrap is the code that loads the SDK itself, so it cannot be sourced from the SDK; it stays per-package but factored to identical minimal shape. Will mirror every .ts change into the .js twin. ZERO behavior change target.

value.author: package-dedup-agent
value.text: DONE. Shared helper: src/sdk/package-runtime-options.ts (new) exports pure readStringOption/readBooleanOption/readCsvListOption; re-exported from src/sdk/runtime.ts so packages obtain them via the SDK runtime bundle they already load (PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT -> dist/sdk/runtime.js). This is the only package-permitted shared surface per tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts (forbids ../../../../{src,dist}/{core,types}/ imports). Each package now validates the helpers exist in its SDK-load guard and pulls them off the loaded module instead of redefining bodies. The ensureRuntimeBundle/loadRuntimeBundle bootstrap stays per-package (it is what loads the SDK) but is now the only duplicated boilerplate, factored to identical shape. Files changed (.ts AND .js twins): packages/pm-search-advanced, pm-governance-audit, pm-guide-shell, pm-linked-test-adapters runtimes; src/sdk/runtime.ts (+re-export); src/sdk/package-runtime-options.ts (new); vitest.config.ts (include new file); tests/unit/package-runtime-options.spec.ts (new, full branch coverage). Net -242 LOC across the 8 package files; single ~85-line shared impl. Tests: pnpm build OK; pnpm typecheck OK (packages incl); search-advanced-runtime + package-runtime-options + package-manifest + builtin-extension-entrypoints (31 passed); governance/aggregate-dedupe/help-runtime/mcp-dynamic-package-actions integration (40 passed); dogfood-package-first exit 0; e2e search keyword default verified. Full coverage gate: 1720/1721 pass; the single failure (release-readiness-runtime files JSON key order) is PRE-EXISTING from the prior agent's uncommitted src/cli/commands/files.ts refactor and is unrelated to this dedup (my diff touches only packages/** + src/sdk/**).

patch.value: Extracted shared dependency-free option-parsing helpers (readStringOption/readBooleanOption/readCsvListOption) into src/sdk/package-runtime-options.ts, re-exported via the SDK runtime surface that bundled packages already load through PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT. pm-search-advanced, pm-governance-audit, pm-guide-shell, and pm-linked-test-adapters (.ts and .js twins) now source these from the loaded SDK instead of redefining them; net -242 LOC. The per-package ensureRuntimeBundle bootstrap necessarily stays local (it is what loads the SDK) and is factored to an identical minimal shape. Zero behavior change; build/typecheck/package+integration tests green.
Extracted shared bundled package runtime option parsing helpers.
Bundled package runtimes use shared option coercers without changing command flags or runtime behavior.
src/sdk/package-runtime-options.ts is covered by focused tests and full release gate passed.
